mapper.select: SELECT MOBILE_NO FROM MCP_USER WHERE USERID = #{userId}
SELECT CNTR_MOBILE_NO FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG B WHERE USERID = #{userId} AND REP_NO = 'R'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG B WHERE USERID = #{userId} AND REP_NO = 'R'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SQ_QNA_BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO NMCP_QNA_BOARD_BAS( QNA_SEQ, QNA_CTG, QNA_SUB_CTG_CD, QNA_SUBJECT, QNA_WRITER_ID, QNA_NM, MOBILE_NO, QNA_CONTENT, ANS_SUBJECT, ANS_CONTENT, ANS_STAT_VAL, ANS_NM, ANS_TEAM_NM, SMS_SEND_YN, QNA_SMS_SEND_YN, DEL_YN, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, CRET_DT, AMD_DT ) VALUES ( #{qnaSeq}, #{qnaCtg}, #{qnaSubCtgCd}, #{qnaSubject}, #{qnaWriterID}, #{qnaNM}, #{mobileNo}, #{qnaContent}, #{ansSubject}, #{ansContent}, '0', #{ansNM}, #{ansTeamNM}, #{smsSendYN}, #{qnaSmsSendYn}, 'N', #{qnaWriterID}, #{qnaWriterID}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT DTL_CD_NM , DTL_CD FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = #{gId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MCP_CALL_QUALITY_AS_LIST WHERE 1=1 AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND COUNSEL_RSLT_CD = 'R'
